title: scrophularia aquatica subsp. cinerea
intro: Scrophularia aquatica subsp. cinerea, also known as Water Figwort or Grey Water Figwort, is a subspecies of the Water Figwort plant that is native to Europe and Asia. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Scrophularia aquatica subsp. cinerea include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Scrophularia aquatica subsp. cinerea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
